rule_metadata.author: frack113
rule_metadata.title: Automated Collection Bookmarks Using Get-ChildItem PowerShell

rules.rule_text:
title: Automated Collection Bookmarks Using Get-ChildItem PowerShell
id: e0565f5d-d420-4e02-8a68-ac00d864f9cf
status: test
description: 'Adversaries may enumerate browser bookmarks to learn more about compromised
  hosts.

  Browser bookmarks may reveal personal information about users (ex: banking sites,
  interests, social media, etc.) as well as details about

  internal network resources such as servers, tools/dashboards, or other related infrastructure.

  '
references:
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1217/T1217.md
author: frack113
date: 2021-12-13
modified: 2022-12-25
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1217
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_script
  definition: 'Requirements: Script Block Logging must be enabled'
detection:
  selection:
    ScriptBlockText|contains|all:
    - Get-ChildItem
    - ' -Recurse '
    - ' -Path '
    - ' -Filter Bookmarks'
    - ' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue'
    - ' -Force'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
